history.qwen_observation: The initial step failed because manually adding spring-boot-starter-test version 3.2.0 conflicted with the project's existing Spring Boot 2.x dependency management, causing missing JUnit 5 classes during compilation.
history.qwen_rationale: Following the compatibility matrix, I will transitively upgrade Spring Boot to 2.7 under JDK 17, then upgrade the build and plugins for Java 21, and finally upgrade Spring Boot to 3.2 under JDK 21. This approach lets OpenRewrite's Spring Boot recipes handle dependency management and Jakarta migration automatically, avoiding manual version conflicts.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed at the first step because JUnit 5 and Spring Boot Test dependencies were missing from the classpath, causing test compilation to abort before any migration recipes could run.
history.qwen_rationale: The previous attempt injected spring-boot-starter-test version 3.2.0, which likely conflicted with the existing Spring Boot 2.x parent POM or failed to resolve transitive dependencies. Switching to version 2.7.18 (compatible with the current baseline) and explicitly adding JUnit Jupiter 5.9.3 ensures the test classpath is valid under JDK 17 before proceeding with framework and JDK upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: The build aborts immediately at the first step due to missing JUnit 5 and Spring Boot test dependencies, causing test compilation to fail before any migration logic executes.
history.qwen_rationale: Manual dependency injection has consistently failed or caused conflicts across prior attempts, likely due to POM structure or dependency management overrides. Replacing it with `UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7` as the initial step allows OpenRewrite to holistically align the Spring Boot BOM, transitively resolve the correct test starters, and stabilize the classpath before proceeding to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x upgrades.

history.qwen_observation: The build fails immediately because test dependencies (JUnit 5 and Spring Boot Test) are missing from the classpath, causing compilation errors before any migration recipes can take effect.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting an explicit step to add spring-boot-starter-test with test scope and a compatible version (2.7.18) before the Spring Boot upgrade step should resolve the missing classpath issue, allowing the build to proceed and subsequent migration recipes to execute.
